summary_cn: 当前线索更像是 Acme Foods。公开网络足迹主要集中在 linkedin, web。建议优先围绕其公开业务方向切入，再决定是否进入深度样品沟通。
summary_en: The lead most likely maps to Acme Foods. The strongest public footprint appears on linkedin and general web results. Lead with a relevant business angle grounded in public evidence before moving to pricing or sample discussions.

company_profile.apparent_business: Company appears focused on private-label frozen food products for EU retail channels.
company_profile.social_presence_overview: 识别到 2 个主要公开平台线索。
company_profile.team_or_scale_clues: 可从官网和 LinkedIn 页面进一步补充。

interest_signals.title: private label
interest_signals.why_it_matters: May indicate OEM or customized packaging relevance.

sales_angles.cn: 可从其零售渠道和自有品牌支持切入，强调稳定规格与配合度。
sales_angles.en: Lead with private-label support and stable frozen vegetable specifications relevant to retail programs.
sales_angles.why: This angle aligns with the apparent business profile.

risk_reasons: 官网和 LinkedIn 存在，但公开信息仍有限。

recommended_angles: Keep the message concise and commercially relevant.

opening_angles.cn: 围绕其自有品牌冷冻食品方向切入。
opening_angles.en: Reference possible private-label frozen food relevance carefully.

first_message_en: We noticed your apparent focus on private-label frozen food lines and thought our product range may be relevant.
follow_up_en: I wanted to follow up in case private-label frozen vegetable support is still relevant.
avoid_points: Do not imply confirmed purchasing plans.
